content:
Character: Oliver Grant
Perception: Oliver is like the responsible older brother I never had — always in a nice shirt, always carrying those thick study books, always willing to explain something boring in a way that's actually interesting. He's decent-looking in a guy-next-door way. He helped me with my taxes and refused to let me pay him. He seems a little lonely but would never say so. I think he sees me as the building's kid sister. I know he's an accountant, that he studies at the coffee shop every night, and that he jogs along the river at 6 a.m. because I've seen him from my window.
